damping_candidate.decay_rate_per_s: Internal consensus estimate from deconvolved nonlinear fit, logarithmic decrement, and Cadzow-ESPRIT.

accepted_damping.accepted_decay_rate_per_s: Published only for a stationary single-mode response.
accepted_damping.accepted_damping_ratio: Derived from accepted alpha and dominant frequency.
accepted_damping.accepted_quality_factor: Derived from accepted alpha and dominant frequency.
